MV "BLOOM HALO

OEGA/PORT ELIZABETH
-- PREF PERIOD UP TO 1 YEAR
-- CAN CONSIDER  VOY BIZ, TRY TCT
-- NO RED SEA
 
MV BLOOM HALO -     (SCRUBBER FITTED)
BUILT/FLAG/BUILT: 2024/PANAMA/JIANGSU YANGZI-MITSUI SHIPBUILDING
DWT/DRAFT/ TPC : ABT 66,039MT/ABT 12.945M SSW/66.30
LOA/BEAM : ABT 199.99 M/ABT 36.00M 
GRT/NRT  ABT 38,287/ 21,668
CLASS : NK
HATCH/HOLD : 5 HATCH/5 HOLD
HATCHSIZE:
(H1) 18.50M X 20.60M
(H2 - H5) 21.1M X 20.60M
GRAIN CAPA: 82,900 M3
CRANE: 35 MT X 4 SETS
GRAB: RADIO CONTROL MECHANICAL TYPE GRABS (MAX 15M3) X 4 SETS
 
SPEED/CONSUMPTION:
(UNDER THE GOOD WEATHER CONDITION ALWAYS UPTO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT SCALE 4
AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT, NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF
SWELL AND CLEAN BOTTOM)
 
AT SEA:
BALLAST: ABOUT 14.2KNOTS ON ABOUT 29.5MT IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT MGO
LADEN : ABOUT 13.5KNOTS ON ABOUT 29.5MT IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT MDO
 
ECO SPEED/CONSUMPTION (GUIDANCE/REFERENCE ONLY, WOG):
BALLAST: ABOUT 12.0KNOTS ON ABOUT 18.3MT(M/E+AUX) IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT
0.2MT MGO
LADEN : ABOUT 12.0KNOTS ON ABOUT 21.1MT(M/E+AUX) IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT
MGO
 
IN PORT:
IDLE ABOUT 2.5MT IFO AND ABOUT 0.2MT MGO
WORKING ABOUT 4.9MT IFO AND ABOUT 0.2MT MGO
 
VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO BURN ADDITIONAL IFO AND/OR MGO WHILE MANOEUVERING,
ALSO WHILST IN RESTRICTED OR CONFINED WATERS OR DURING WINTER.
VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO BURN MGO AT PORT/AREA WHEN OPEN LOOP SCRUBBER IS NOT
ALLOWED
 
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
